title: Warsh's Fed eliminates forward guidance on rates and opens the door to new hikes
summary: The new Federal Reserve Chairman, Warsh, begins a reform that includes the end of forward guidance on monetary policy, amid growing expectations of rate hikes.

title: Nikkei surpasses 71,000 points for first time driven by expectations of opening of Ormuz
summary: The Japanese stock index reaches a new all-time high, supported by easing tensions in the Middle East and the strength of technology stocks.

title: US and Iran sign 14-point memorandum to end hostilities and reopen Ormuz
summary: The presidents of both countries seal an agreement that establishes free navigation in the Strait of Ormuz and the start of nuclear negotiations, with the threat of retaliation if not complied with.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス - 主要

title: Woman stabs her friend in Fukuoka and is arrested for homicide
summary: A 36-year-old woman was arrested after confessing to repeatedly stabbing her friend in the neck, who died from her injuries.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス - 主要

title: Japan's emperors begin state visit to the Netherlands with emphasis on peace
summary: During their stay, the emperors attend a gala dinner, visit water management institutes, and highlight the friendship between both nations.

title: Campaign for Shiga governorship begins with three candidates
summary: The current governor seeks reelection against two new aspirants, with debates on new taxes and regional management.

title: England starts World Cup with a thrashing of Croatia and Kane as star
summary: The English team beats Croatia 4-0 in its debut, with two goals from Harry Kane, and positions itself as a title contender.

title: Kubo injures left knee and is doubtful for match against Tunisia
summary: The Japanese forward suffered an injury in the first match against the Netherlands and could miss the next World Cup match.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス - 主要

title: UN denounces record violations of children's rights in armed conflicts
summary: The annual report points to governments and armed groups, including Israel, for killings and recruitment of minors, reaching unprecedented numbers.

title: Prosecution seeks life imprisonment for double homicide in nursing home in Ibaraki
summary: The defendant, 40, pleads innocent while the prosecution maintains that the crime was premeditated.

title: Japanese police will deploy an agent in Thailand to combat phone fraud
summary: The measure seeks to coordinate the fight against scams from Southeast Asia, where operation centers have been identified.

title: Japanese SMEs suffer from rising interest rates and lack of government aid
summary: Small business owners denounce that rate hikes do not correspond to economic reality and worsen their financial burden.

title: G7 reaffirms commitment to economic security and protection of minors online
summary: G7 leaders approve documents on critical minerals, trade imbalances, and online age verification, with China in the crosshairs.

title: Portugal draws with Democratic Republic of the Congo in World Cup debut
summary: The Portuguese team only manages a draw against the DRC, which returns to the World Cup after 52 years, while Cristiano Ronaldo fails to score.

title: France starts with victory and Mbappé double in World Cup
summary: The reigning world champion shows its offensive prowess with two goals from Kylian Mbappé, consolidating itself as one of the favorites.

title: Japan promotes use of AI in English classes and records record in language proficiency
summary: The Ministry of Education plans to incorporate artificial intelligence into curricula while high school English results reach their highest level, although regional differences persist.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス - 主要

title: Captain of sunken boat in Shiretoko sentenced to 5 years in prison
summary: The court considered that the accident, which caused the death of 26 people, was foreseeable and that the defendant did not take the necessary measures.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi pushes effective zero rate on food to avoid criticism
summary: The plan contemplates refunding 1% of consumption tax on food, seeking to fulfill electoral promises without incurring breach of commitments.

title: Takaichi and European Commission president agree to cooperate on defense and critical minerals
summary: Both leaders underline the importance of strengthening the supply chain and the defense industry in the face of global challenges.

title: Trump requested Japan to refuse to participate in military operations against Iran
summary: The US president proposed to the Japanese prime minister the possibility of Tokyo refusing to get involved in a possible armed conflict.
